verses.text: Tua ciangin Jerusalem-ah a tengte in ama tangin a tapa neupen Ahaziah kumpi-in koih uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Arab mite tawh giahphualah hong pai mite in a tapa golzawte khempeuh that khin uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Judah kumpi Jehoram' tapa Ahaziah in uk hi
Ahaziah in uk ding a kipatin kum sawmlilenih pha a, Jerusalem-ah kum khat sung uk hi. Ama nu' min Athaliah hi a, Omri' tanu ahi hi
Ama nu in a sia-a a gamtatna ding lamlak ahih manin amah zong Ahab innkuan dangte' gamtat bangin a gamta hi
Ahab innkuan dangte mah bangin Topa' muhna-ah a sia gamta hi; bang hang hiam cih leh a pa' sih khit ciangin ama siatna dingah thu lamlakte pen Ahab' innkuante ahi uh hi
Amah in amaute' thugen nangawn zui a, Ramothgilead-ah Syria kumpi Hazael tawh a kido dingin Israel kumpi Ahab' tapa Joram tawh a kuan hi. Tua ciangin Syria mite in Joram liamsak uh a

Syria kumpi Hazael a do laitakin gal sungah a ngah a liamnate Jezreel-ah a kidamsak dingin a kileh kik hi. Tua ciangin Jezreel-ah Ahab' tapa Joram a ci na ahih manin amah a en dingin Judah kumpi Jehoram' tapa Ahaziah a hawhsuk hi.

Ahih hangin Joram' kiangah a hawhna tawh Ahaziah' pukna a tun'na ding Pasian' sehsa ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua lai-ah amah a hawh sungin Ahab innkuan a susia dingin Topa in sathau a nilhsa, Nimshi' tapa Jehu tawh a kimu dingin Joram tawh paikhia hi
Jehu in Ahab innkuan tungah Pasian' thukhenna a sepkhiat laitakin Judah uliante leh Ahaziah' na a sem, Ahaziah' sanggam pasalte' tapate tuak a, amah in amaute a that hi

Amah in Ahaziah zong a, Samaria-ah a buk laitakin amah kiman a, tua ciangin Jehu kiangah amah kipaipihin kithat hi. Amaute in amah vui uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in, “Amah pen a lungsim khempeuh tawh Topa a zong Jehoshafat' tupa ahi hi,” ci uh hi. Tua ciangin Ahaziah innkuante in kumpi gam a ukzo ding mi khat zong nei nawnlo uh hi.
Tu-in Ahaziah' nu Athaliah in a tapa a sihna a theih ciangin amah kipanin Judah sung pan kumpi innkuan khempeuh thatsak hi

Ahih hangin kumpipa' tanu Jehosheba in Ahaziah' tapa Joash la a, a kithat ding kumpipa' tapate lak panin amah gukhia-in lupna sen'na inndei sungah amah leh a cingnu a koih hi. Amah pen Ahaziah' sanggamnu ahih manin Kumpi Jehoram' tanu ahi, siampi Jehoiada' zi Jehosheba in tua bangin Athaliah' kiang panin amah seel a, tuanu in amah thatkha lo hi
Tua bangin Athaliah in gamsung a uk laitakin Pasian' biakinn sungah bu-in kum guk sung amaute tawh amah a om hi.
